articles.title: Flavor-Space Analog to the Aharonov-Bohm Effect for a Constant Scalar Matter Potential in Neutrino Flavor Interferometry
articles.title_zh: 中微子味道干涉测量中恒定标量物质势的阿哈罗诺夫-玻姆效应的味道空间模拟
articles.abstract: Author(s): José Bernabéu and Catalina Espinoza The Aharonov-Bohm effect is one of the most surprising wonders of the quantum world. Its interpretation is debated between a physical significance of the potential versus nonlocality of quantum physics, ambiguity which cannot be resolved from all performed spatial interference experiments. We put fo… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 136, 131802] Published Wed Apr 01, 2026
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：何塞·伯纳乌和卡塔利娜·埃斯皮诺萨 阿哈罗诺夫-玻姆效应是量子世界中最令人惊讶的奇迹之一。它的解释在势的物理意义与量子物理学的非定域性之间存在争议，所有进行的空间干涉实验都无法解决这一模糊性。我们把……[物理。莱特牧师。 136, 131802] 2026 年 4 月 1 日星期三发布
